name: Trickstar Hoody
name_jp: トリックスター・フーディ
desc: If you control a "Trickstar" Fusion or Link Monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is sent to the GY as material for a "Trickstar" Link Monster: You can add 1 "Trickstar Fusion" or "Trickstar Diffusion" from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Trickstar Hoody" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If you control a "Trickstar" Fusion or Link Monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is sent to the GY as material for a "Trickstar" Link Monster: You can add 1 "Trickstar Fusion" or "Trickstar Diffusion" from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Trickstar Hoody" once per turn.
eff: If you control a "Trickstar" Fusion or Link Monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is sent to the GY as material for a "Trickstar" Link Monster: You can add 1 "Trickstar Fusion" or "Trickstar Diffusion" from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Trickstar Hoody" once per turn.

action: Activates if sent to the Graveyard
Activates if used as Link Material
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
